name: chokepoint-renamed-rmm
bodyMarkdown:
# Renamed RMM Tools — Detection Chokepoint

**Priority:** HIGH | **Tactic:** Initial Access, C2 | **Difficulty:** MEDIUM | **Prevalence:** HIGH
**Techniques:** T1219.002

## Overview
Legitimate RMM tools renamed to appear as trusted applications. Binary must land on disk, execute, and establish C2 — all required regardless of tool.

## Chokepoint Stages

### 1. Browser Download
Executable written to Downloads/Temp by browser.
Observable: EID 11 (browser writing .exe to user-writable path).

### 2. User Execution
Renamed binary executes. PE metadata betrays mismatch.
Observable: EID 1 where Image filename differs from PE OriginalFilename.

### 3. Outbound RMM Connection
Persistent C2 to RMM infrastructure.
Observable: EID 3 (outbound HTTPS to RMM relay domains).

## Variations (9 tracked)
AnyDesk, TeamViewer, ScreenConnect, UltraViewer, RustDesk, SimpleHelp, NetSupport, Atera, RMM-to-RMM deployment.

## Detection Logic
- **Research:** All known RMM tool processes in environment
- **Hunt:** EID 11 (file in Downloads) + EID 1 (execution within 5min)
- **Analyst:** Campaign filename + OriginalFilename mismatch + EID 3 to RMM infra
